wine_experiences.name: Fiesta de la Vendimia de Jerez
wine_experiences.address: Plaza de la Alameda Vieja, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: The annual Jerez harvest festival held in early September centres on the Pisada de la Uva ceremony: barefoot treading of the first Palomino Fino grapes in the traditional lagares at the Gonzalez Byass bodega. Open-air events, flamenco performances and free sherry tastings run across the historic centre for several days.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Annual harvest festival with grape-treading, free tastings and flamenco performances
wine_experiences.price: Free public events; premium seated concerts and VIP bodega dinners from EUR 80

wine_experiences.name: Pisada de la Uva Grape Treading Ceremony
wine_experiences.address: Calle Manuel Maria Gonzalez 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: The ancient barefoot grape-treading ritual performed at the Gonzalez Byass bodega at the start of the Vendimia. Participants in traditional Jota costumes tread Palomino Fino grapes in the lagar to produce the first must of the harvest. A highlight of the Jerez sherry calendar and an internationally attended ritual.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Traditional grape-treading ceremony, open to public viewing
wine_experiences.price: Free public viewing; premium viewing positions via Vendimia festival tickets

verified.address_quoted: C. Manuel Maria Gonzalez, 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_experiences.name: Flor Development and En Rama Comparative Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Calle Arcos 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: A structured educational tasting at Bodegas Lustau comparing En Rama (unfiltered, direct from butt) and standard filtered expressions of the same Fino and Manzanilla solera. The session demonstrates how fining and filtration alter texture, oxidation and aroma, led by the Lustau head winemaker.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Comparative winemaking tasting led by bodega winemaker

verified.address_quoted: C/ Arcos, 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_experiences.name: Equipo Navazos La Bota Single-Cask Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Calle Corredera 20, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: Equipo Navazos releases scarce single-cask sherries under the La Bota series, each a numbered butt bought from a specific solera and bottled unfiltered. Private tasting events in Jerez allow subscribers to taste pre-release samples from different butts across a horizontal comparison session.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Private pre-release single-cask comparative tasting (subscription and invitation basis)
wine_experiences.price: From EUR 120 per person; invitation or subscriber access required

wine_experiences.name: Bodegas Tradicion VORS Vertical Private Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Calle Cordobeses 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: A private tasting session at Bodegas Tradicion presenting a vertical of Fino, Amontillado, Palo Cortado and Oloroso all at VORS (30+ years) solera age. The session is conducted in the Pinacoteca gallery surrounded by the Golden Age art collection, making it an immersive cultural and sensory event.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Private VORS four-style vertical tasting in the art gallery
wine_experiences.price: EUR 65 to EUR 120 per person depending on group size

verified.address_quoted: C/ Cordobeses, 3, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_experiences.name: Aponiente Sherry and Marine Pairing Experience
wine_experiences.address: Calle Francisco Cossi Ochoa s/n, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria, Spain
wine_experiences.description: The tasting menu at Aponiente functions as an extended sherry pairing experience, with chef Angel Leon's marine courses matched to an expert-selected Jerez DO progression. The full pairing menu is the most structured sherry-with-food experience in the Marco de Jerez.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Michelin-starred tasting menu with full Jerez DO sherry pairing progression
wine_experiences.price: EUR 285 to EUR 350 per person including sherry pairing

verified.address_quoted: C/ Francisco Cossi Ochoa, s/n, 11500 El Puerto de Santa Maria

wine_experiences.name: Venencia Masterclass at Consejo Regulador
wine_experiences.address: Calle Alameda Vieja 5, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: A hands-on workshop teaching the venencia technique: extracting sherry from the barrel with the traditional silver and whalebone tool and pouring into a copita from height without spillage. Conducted at the Consejo Regulador by a practising capataz de bodega.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Hands-on venencia technique workshop led by a capataz

verified.address_quoted: Calle Alameda Vieja 5, Jerez de la Frontera

wine_experiences.name: Harvest Participation at Gonzalez Byass
wine_experiences.address: Calle Manuel Maria Gonzalez 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: A limited harvest participation programme at Gonzalez Byass during the September Vendimia, in which guests join the bodega team in the Macharnudo vineyard for the Palomino Fino pick. The day concludes with a must tasting and bodega dinner.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Hands-on harvest day at working Palomino Fino vineyard followed by must tasting and dinner
wine_experiences.price: EUR 150 per person; limited spaces during September harvest

verified.address_quoted: C. Manuel Maria Gonzalez, 12, 11403 Jerez de la Frontera

wine_experiences.name: Barbadillo En Rama vs Filtered Manzanilla Comparison
wine_experiences.address: Calle Luis de Eguilaz 11, 11540 Sanlucar de Barrameda, Spain
wine_experiences.description: Bodegas Barbadillo runs a structured comparison session contrasting the seasonal En Rama edition of Solear Manzanilla directly against the year-round filtered version from the same solera. The session is guided by a Barbadillo winemaker and focuses on the role of filtration, oxygen contact and bottling season.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Winemaker-led En Rama and filtered parallel comparison tasting

verified.address_quoted: C/ Luis de Eguilaz, 11, Sanlucar de Barrameda

wine_experiences.name: Solera Blending Workshop at Lustau
wine_experiences.address: Calle Arcos 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera, Spain
wine_experiences.description: A hands-on blending workshop at Bodegas Lustau where participants draw wine from different scales of the criadera and solera system and assemble their own blend. Led by a Lustau cellar master; each participant takes home a labelled bottle of their custom blend.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Hands-on solera blending workshop with take-home bottling

verified.address_quoted: C/ Arcos, 53, 11402 Jerez de la Frontera
